history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair, wearing a white linen shirt and black pants, is sitting in the passenger seat of a modern SUV. He is looking down at his smartphone, which he holds in his hands. The phone screen displays a grid of small images, possibly a social media feed or a photo gallery. The car's interior is luxurious, with beige leather seats and a dark dashboard featuring a large infotainment screen. The steering wheel, with a Mitsubishi logo, is visible in the foreground. A black leather wallet rests in the center console. Sunlight streams in through the windows, illuminating the interior and casting soft shadows. Outside the car, through the windows, a blurred background of trees and buildings can be seen, suggesting an outdoor, possibly semi-urban or suburban setting. The overall mood is relaxed and casual. The image is captured from a medium-low angle, emphasizing the man and the car's interior. The lighting is natural daylight, creating a bright and airy atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones: beige, black, white, and the muted greens and browns of the background.
